scripts.cleanBuild: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.deepClean: npx shx rm -rf package.json.backup package-lock.json npm-shrinkwrap.json build node_modules/* node_modules/.[!.]* node_modules/..?*
scripts.reset: npm run deepClean && npm install --no-fund --no-audit && npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.softReset: npm install --no-fund --no-audit && npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.updateDependencies: npx npm-check-updates -u && npm install --no-fund --no-audit && npm run cleanBuild
scripts.runMeBeforePublish: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run cleanBuild && npm pkg delete devDependencies scripts && npx shx rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json npm-shrinkwrap.json && npm install --no-fund --no-audit --omit=dev && npm shrinkwrap --omit=dev
scripts.npmPack: npx shx cp package.json package.json.backup && npm run prepublishOnly && npm pack && npx shx cp package.json.backup package.json && npm run reset
scripts.npmPublishTagDev: npx shx cp package.json package.json.backup && npm run prepublishOnly && npm publish --tag dev && npx shx cp package.json.backup package.json && npm run reset
scripts.npmPublishTagEdge: npx shx cp package.json package.json.backup && npm run prepublishOnly && npm publish --tag edge && npx shx cp package.json.backup package.json && npm run reset
scripts.npmPublishTagLatest: npx shx cp package.json package.json.backup && npm run prepublishOnly && npm publish --tag latest && npx shx cp package.json.backup package.json && npm run reset
